title: ignition bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.23.0-2]
- Build Ignition with GOEXPERIMENT=strictfipsruntime
  Ignition-validate non-FIPS
- Backport https://github.com/coreos/ignition/pull/2159

[2.23.0-1]
- New release
full_text:
[2.23.0-2]
- Build Ignition with GOEXPERIMENT=strictfipsruntime
  Ignition-validate non-FIPS
- Backport https://github.com/coreos/ignition/pull/2159

[2.23.0-1]
- New release
